questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Database Views?
options: Inefficient scaling of Standard logical views vs Materialized Views refresh caches algorithms.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Standard logical views vs Materialized Views refresh caches algorithms.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Standard logical views vs Materialized Views refresh caches algorithms scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
